title: Repurposed Structures - Friends and Foes Compat
description: Add Copper Golems and Beekeepers to RS Villages
body:
Add this datapack (or mod in 1.20.2+) to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Friends and Foes mod. You will find Copper Golems and Beekeepers in RS's Overworld Villages!

- Friends & Foes mod can be obtained from here: 

  - https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes
  
  - https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: 

  - https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

  - https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UYd23ZmY/images/76531a702ae31a9dc5585270cf428307c6e543d8.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UYd23ZmY/images/76531a702ae31a9dc5585270cf428307c6e543d8.png)


**Note:** If using the datapack form of this project, put the datapack into your world's datapack folder. Also, there exist some mods that can read datapacks from specific folders to apply them to all worlds.
